archetype: Energetic Premium (Blend of Archetype 5 Jewel/Luxury & Archetype 7 Electric/Modern)

typography.logo: Syne, ExtraBold (Text-based, e.g. 'Indgig' with #FFB902 accent mark)
typography.hierarchy_rules: H1 max text-5xl sm:text-6xl. H2 max text-4xl. No text-8xl or massive jumps. Use fluid typography constraints.

styling_rules.buttons: Primary: bg-[#FFB902] text-black font-bold rounded-full hover:bg-[#E5A600] transition-colors duration-300. Ghost: bg-transparent border border-white/20 text-white rounded-full hover:bg-white/10.
styling_rules.cards: Glassmorphism (Optical Clarity): bg-white/[0.03] backdrop-blur-2xl border border-white/10 rounded-3xl p-8 hover:border-[#FFB902]/40 transition-all duration-300 shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.4)].
styling_rules.glows: Use absolute positioned divs with blur-[100px] or blur-3xl and bg-[#FFB902]/20 for ambient golden glows behind key sections (Hero, CTA).
styling_rules.spacing: Generous Spacing: p-8, p-12 for containers. gap-8 for grids. py-24 to py-32 for sections.

sections.name: Navbar
sections.instructions: Sticky to top. z-50. Transparent at top, transitions to backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#0A0A0A]/80 with border-b border-white/10 on scroll. Elements: Logo (left), Nav links (center), 'Download App' primary button (right).

sections.name: Hero Section
sections.instructions: Layout: Split or centered with massive golden radial glow in background. Headline: 'Your Stage is Waiting.' in Syne. Subheadline describing the two-sided platform. CTAs: 'Download the App' (Primary) & 'Join the Waitlist' (Ghost). Badges: Placeholder SVG text badges for App Store/Google Play. Mockup: Floating CSS-styled smartphone mockup with dark UI placeholder, tilted using Framer Motion.

media.description: Dark stage with spotlight. Use absolute positioned behind the radial glow at 10% opacity, mix-blend-overlay to add texture.

sections.name: How It Works
sections.instructions: 3 sequential steps. Layout: flex-col md:flex-row gap-8 relative. Visuals: A #FFB902 accent line (1px dashed or solid opacity-50) connecting the steps. Steps: 1. Create Profile, 2. Discover & Connect, 3. Book & Get Paid. Use large numbering in Syne.

sections.name: Features Grid
sections.instructions: 6 Cards using the Bento Grid Protocol (Tetris Mode) rather than a uniform grid. Mix col-span-1 and col-span-2 on a 3-column lg grid. Cards are Glassmorphic. Features: Discover Gigs, Easy Booking, Secure Payments, Manage Schedule, In-App Messaging, Reviews & Ratings. Icons: Lucide icons colored in #FFB902.

media.description: Musician playing guitar - Use in the 'Discover Gigs' large card as a faded background image.
Dark atmospheric restaurant - Use in the 'Book Venues' card as a faded background.

sections.name: Social Proof Strip
sections.instructions: Full width row. 3 data points: 500+ Artists, 200+ Venues, 1,000+ Gigs Booked. Numbers should be large (text-5xl) Syne, #FFB902. Use count-up animation when in view. Wrap in a border-y border-white/10 bg-[#111111]/50 container.

sections.name: Waitlist Sign-Up
sections.instructions: UI-only form. Toggle: Use Shadcn Tabs styled as a pill toggle (bg-white/5 p-1 rounded-full) with 'I\'m a Talent' and 'I\'m a Business' options. Form: Email input (dark bg-white/5 border-white/10 focus:border-[#FFB902]) and Submit button. Add data-testid to all inputs and buttons.

sections.name: App Download CTA
sections.instructions: High impact section. Background: Heavy #FFB902 radial glow. Layout: Text on left, floating placeholder phone mockup on right. CTA: Download App buttons.

media.description: Dark smartphone screen close up. Can be used inside the floating phone frame mockup.

sections.name: Footer
sections.instructions: Minimalist. border-t border-white/10. Logo, copyright, simple column of links, and social media icons (lucide-react).

components_to_use: framer-motion (Scroll animations, entrance staggers, floating mockup)
shadcn/ui (Tabs for toggle, Input for form)

accessibility_and_testing.data_testid_rule: ALL interactive elements must have semantic data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='hero-cta-button').
accessibility_and_testing.prefers_reduced_motion: Ensure Framer Motion animations respect useReducedMotion hook or equivalent.
accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Text over glows must maintain WCAG AA minimum. #FFFFFF on #0A0A0A is perfect. Avoid #A3A3A3 text inside pure #FFB902 buttons, use black text on yellow buttons.
